name: thirdeye
description: Two way chat between Discord and Minecraft Bedrock along with logs for Anticheats.

scripts.copy:assets: cp -R src/Install_NodeJS_Modules.bat src/Install_NodeJS_Modules.sh src/Run.bat src/Run.sh src/whitelist.json package.json LICENSE README.md build/ && mkdir -p build/profanity && cp -R src/profanity/. build/profanity/ && if [ -f package-lock.json ]; then cp package-lock.json build/; fi && if [ -f npm-shrinkwrap.json ]; then cp npm-shrinkwrap.json build/; fi
scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run mkDirs && node node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc -p tsconfig.json && npm run copy:assets && node modify-package.js
scripts.copy_assets_win: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Copy-Item -Path 'src/Install_NodeJS_Modules.bat','src/Install_NodeJS_Modules.sh','src/Run.bat','src/Run.sh','src/whitelist.json','package.json','LICENSE','README.md' -Destination 'build' -Recurse -Force; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path 'build/profanity' -Force | Out-Null; Copy-Item -Path 'src/profanity/*' -Destination 'build/profanity' -Recurse -Force; if (Test-Path 'package-lock.json') { Copy-Item 'package-lock.json' -Destination 'build' -Force }; if (Test-Path 'npm-shrinkwrap.json') { Copy-Item 'npm-shrinkwrap.json' -Destination 'build' -Force }"
scripts.build_win: npm run clean_win && npm run mkdir_win && node node_modules\typescript\bin\tsc -p tsconfig.json && npm run copy_assets_win && node modify-package.js
